summary: Fleet GPS History / Route Replay feature - Complete testing of backend APIs and frontend UI. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for login, navigation, device selector, date picker, map rendering, route polyline with speed colors, start/end markers, replay controls, stats panel, and navigation flows.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting (span inside select/option) - React dev tools injection, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing real GPS data from Teltonika hardware.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet GPS History / Route Replay feature fully functional. Backend APIs: GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei} (position history with date range), GET /api/fleet/gps/history-days/{imei} (list of days with data), GET /api/fleet/gps/devices (device list). Frontend: FleetGPSHistory page at /fleet/gps-history with Leaflet map, device selector, date picker, route polyline with speed-based colors (green <50, amber 50-90, red >90 km/h), start/end markers, replay controls (play/pause, 1x-50x speed, timeline slider), stats panel (distance, duration, max/avg speed). Navigation: sidebar 'Historique GPS' link, History button on FleetGeolocation page, back button returns to /fleet/geolocation. Real data available for dates 2026-03-22 (1093 positions, 74.8km) and 2026-03-23 (331 positions, 9.5km).

backend_apis: GET /api/fleet/gps/devices - returns devices array with imei, vehicleName, licensePlate ✓
GET /api/fleet/gps/history-days/{imei} - returns days array with date, positions, maxSpeed ✓
GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei} - returns history array with timestamp, lat, lng, speed, heading ✓
GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei} - positions sorted by timestamp ascending ✓
GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei} - empty for date with no data ✓
GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei} - positions have speed data for route coloring ✓
frontend_flows: Fleet Login: Navigate to /fleet/login, enter credentials, redirect to dashboard ✓
Sidebar Navigation: 'Historique GPS' link visible and clickable ✓
GPS History Page: data-testid='gps-history-page' container loads ✓
Replay Map: data-testid='replay-map' Leaflet map renders ✓
Device Selector: data-testid='device-select' populated with devices ✓
Date Picker: data-testid='date-picker' allows date selection ✓
Route Polyline: Speed-based colors (green/amber/red) rendered on map ✓
Start Marker: Green dot at route start ✓
End Marker: Red dot at route end ✓
Replay Controls: data-testid='replay-controls' visible when data loaded ✓
Timeline Slider: data-testid='replay-timeline' allows position seeking ✓
Speed Buttons: 1x, 2x, 5x, 10x, 25x, 50x all present and clickable ✓
Stats Panel: Distance (74.8 km), Duration (10h41), Max Speed (119 km/h), Avg Speed (46 km/h) ✓
Current Position Info: Shows speed, coordinates, time, satellites ✓
History Button on Geolocation: data-testid='gps-history-btn' navigates to GPS History ✓
